# First Class Auto Glass

> AGSC-certified auto glass repair, windshield replacement, and ADAS recalibration serving Mooresville and Iredell County, North Carolina. Mobile and in-shop service, all major insurance accepted, OEM-quality glass, and a lifetime warranty. 15+ years in business.

## Key facts
- Business name: First Class Auto Glass
- Phone: (980) 242-8339
- Email: contact@firstclassautoglassnc.com
- Address: 1892 Charlotte Hwy, Unit 1, Mooresville, NC 28115
- Service area: Mooresville, Statesville, Lexington, and all of Iredell County, North Carolina
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9:00 AM–5:00 PM; Saturday 9:00 AM–11:30 AM; Sunday closed
- Certifications: AGSC (Auto Glass Safety Council) certified technicians
- Warranty: Limited lifetime warranty on repairs and replacements
- Insurance: Accepts all major insurance companies and handles claim paperwork

## Services
- Windshield repair — flat-rate chip repair from $80
- Windshield replacement — OEM-quality glass
- ADAS calibration / recalibration — performed in-house after windshield replacement
- Door (side) glass replacement
- Back window / rear glass replacement (heated options available)
- Vent glass replacement
- Mobile service throughout Iredell County, plus in-shop service

## Common questions
- Cheapest service: flat-rate windshield chip repair starts at $80.
- Mobile service: yes, we come to your home or workplace anywhere in Iredell County.
- Insurance: all major insurers accepted; we file the claim for you.
- ADAS: vehicles with driver-assistance cameras require recalibration after windshield replacement; we do it in-house.
- Repair vs replace: small chips/short cracks outside the driver's view are usually repairable; large, edge, or in-view damage needs replacement.

## Related
- Co-located with Sharpe's Auto Inspection (NC vehicle inspections & emissions) in the same building — combine auto glass service and state inspection in one visit.
